creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

  FreeBSD ports repository

  - Update to 2.3.4
  - Update MASTER_SITES
  - Update dependencies
  - Update manpages
  - Remove useless old stuff
  - Update WWW in pkg-descr
